meaning: African National Congress,非洲民族会议
examples: The ANC announced it was mounting a major campaign of mass political protests.
Inkatha and the ANC have blamed each other for the violence which took place as thousands of Inkatha supporters marched through the city to demand the creation of a sovereign Zulu kingdom.
The ANC could not afford to lower its guard until everything had been carried out.
Did South Africa's parliament - ANC and opposition - fail in its duty of oversight?
The ANC has dominated South African politics since its first democratic election in 1994.
